name: Stickman Parkour 3
author: Poki
description: Stickman Parkour 3 is an action game that invites you to an exciting adventure in the world of stickmen! Race through all levels filled with running, jumping, flipping, and more stunts! Watch out for various traps, tricky platforms, and enemies lurking around the corner. Gather as much fruit as you can along the way to boost your score. Want to challenge your friends? Take the action online and compete in thrilling PvP matches to see who is the ultimate platformer. Or, team up in co-op mode to overcome obstacles together. Get ready to run and leap alongside your friends! How to play Stickman Parkour 3? Move left: A or the left key Move right: D or the right key Jump: W or the up key Who created Stickman Parkour 3? Stickman Parkour 3 is created by Art Industries. Play their other games on Poki: Zombie Dying: Survival Days , Stickman Crazy Box , Stickman Parkour 2: Lucky Block , Tank Ball: Monster Battle , Mad Scientist Clicker: Idle Crazy Inc , and Stickman Parkour Skyland ! How can I play Stickman Parkour 3 for free? You can play Stickman Parkour 3 for free on Poki. Can I play Stickman Parkour 3 on mobile devices and desktop? Stickman Parkour 3 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Stickman Parkour 3 with my friend? Yes! Stickman Parkour 3 is a single or multiplayer game so you can play with your friend!
